hero.title: Authentic India & World Travel
hero.subtitle: Travel crafted by people who care
hero.description: Experience the real India with local experts and authentic cultural immersions.

goldenTriangle.title: Golden Triangle Tour
goldenTriangle.description: Explore India's iconic cities: Delhi, Jaipur, and Agra with private transport and guides.

itinerary.day1: Delhi: Qutub Minar, Lotus Temple, Humayun's Tomb, India Gate
itinerary.day2: Jaipur: Amber Fort, Jal Mahal, Hawa Mahal, City Palace, Jantar Mantar

delhiDay.title: Delhi Day Tour
delhiDay.description: Discover Delhi's rich history and culture in one full day with expert local guides.

itinerary.highlights: Qutub Minar, Lotus Temple, Humayun's Tomb, India Gate, Red Fort

jaipurDay.title: Jaipur Day Tour
jaipurDay.description: Experience the Pink City with visits to Amber Fort, City Palace, and vibrant markets.

itinerary.highlights: Amber Fort, Jal Mahal, Hawa Mahal, City Palace, Jantar Mantar, local markets

agraDay.title: Agra Day Tour
agraDay.description: Visit the Taj Mahal and Mughal monuments with sunrise viewing and expert narration.

itinerary.highlights: Taj Mahal (sunrise), Agra Fort, Fatehpur Sikri (optional)

contact.title: Ready to Start Your Journey?
contact.subtitle: Get in touch for personalized travel planning and special offers.

footer.brand: Your gateway to India's wonders. We specialize in creating unforgettable travel experiences across the Golden Triangle and beyond.
